ddls:
CREATE TABLE "task_performance_logs" (
  "exp_repl_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment replication log entry */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the run associated with this log entry */,
  "run_rept_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report generated for this run */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the task being logged */,
  "test" TEXT /* Type of test (e.g., read or write) */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed during this task (e.g., create/open, write/read) */,
  "start_time" REAL /* Timestamp indicating when the task started */,
  "stop_time" REAL /* Timestamp indicating when the task stopped */,
  "latency" REAL /* Latency of the task in seconds */,
  "throughput" REAL /* Throughput of the task in operations per second */,
  "task_status" TEXT /* Status of the task (e.g., completed, failed, in progress) */,
  "error_code" TEXT /* Error code if the task failed */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Detailed error message for troubleshooting */,
  "resource_id" TEXT /* ID of the resource where the task was executed */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment in which the task was run (e.g., development, staging, production) */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* User who initiated the task */,
  "batch_id" TEXT /* ID of the batch to which the task belongs */,
  "data_size" INTEGER /* Size of the data processed by the task in bytes */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data processed (e.g., CSV, JSON, Parquet) */,
  "processing_engine" TEXT /* Data processing engine used (e.g., Spark, Hadoop, Flink) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the task or processing engine */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Additional tags or metadata for the task */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exp_repl_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each experiment replication log entry
ID of the run associated with this log entry
ID of the report generated for this run
Unique identifier for the task being logged
